creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
print/tex-xdvik fails during configure:

===>  Configuring for tex-xdvik-22.87.06_1
Can't exec "libtoolize": No such file or directory at /usr/local/share/autoconf2.71/Autom4te/FileUtils.pm line 293.
autoreconf2.71: error: libtoolize failed with exit status: 2
===>  Mk/Uses/autoreconf.mk: Error running /usr/local/bin/autoreconf2.71
*** Error code 1

Observed on both main and stable/13.
